ASHWATER.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ASHWATER.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
ASHWATER.title: Ashwater
